mapper.sql: id, username, password_hash, display_name, phone, email, status, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user_account WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM user_account WHERE id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT FROM user_account WHERE deleted = 0
AND (username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR display_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_account (username, password_hash, display_name, phone, email, status, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{displayName}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{status}, #{id}, #{id})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_account SET display_name = #{displayName}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, updated_by = #{id} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE user_account SET password_hash = #{passwordHash} WHERE id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE user_account SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE user_account SET last_login_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT r.role_code FROM user_role ur INNER JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.id AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 'ENABLED' WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND ur.deleted = 0

SELECT DISTINCT p.permission_code FROM user_role ur INNER JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.id AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 'ENABLED' INNER JOIN role_permission rp ON r.id = rp.role_id AND rp.deleted = 0 INNER JOIN permission p ON rp.permission_id = p.id AND p.deleted = 0 WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND ur.deleted = 0
SELECT project_id FROM project_member WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 'ENABLED' ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 1
